violations.text: Cartons of raw eggs were observed stored on shelving in the walk-in cooler above beverage containers considered Ready-for-use/ready to eat. Eggs are to be stored on the shelf at the bottom to prevent possible contamination of other ready-to-eat item below. (Eggs were relocated for proper storage at time of inspection.) Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026

Various foods were observed held at 43-44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Unit was adjusted. Food was moved to walk-in to rapidly cool. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023
